title: CI: cleanup old cirrus files
body: With the gh actions move we should remove all the old cirrus only files.

comments.body: Possibly quite low in priority but there's quite a bit of Cirrus-specific info in https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/main/RELEASE_PROCESS.md that should be updated to match our new GHA-based CI. I'll add a new issue under the CI epic.
yes I am sure there are still some references those should be cleaned up so a new issue sounds fine
